# PERF-93 negative: Fiber handler returns a pre-encoded body, no per-request JSON encode
lang: go
file: PERF-093-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

var cachedBody = []byte(`{"msg":"hello"}`)

func GetUser(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	c.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	return c.Send(cachedBody)
}
